title: Treatment of Giardia infection (giardiasis) - Canada.ca
content:
## Treatment of Giardia infection (giardiasis)
Learn how Giardia infection is diagnosed  and treated.
- How to diagnose Giardia infection
- How to treat Giardia infection

## How to diagnose Giardia infection
Giardia is diagnosed by a health care provider through laboratory testing, usually of a stool sample.

## How to treat Giardia infection
Most people recover without treatment. If symptoms persist, certain drugs can be used to treat the infection .
